item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2

https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI2/-/wikis/home

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video
https://youtu.be/S7343rgpQNI
https://youtu.be/y3QgToXvzOE
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

item.title: SeriousSamClassic-VK [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: SeriousSamClassic-VK [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: tx00100xt
item.itunes:summary:
SeriousSamClassic-VK
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic-VK is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic with Vulkan support, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports Vulkan and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the how to install section for more information.
[read more]
item.description:
SeriousSamClassic-VK
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic-VK is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic with Vulkan support, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports Vulkan and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the how to install section for more information.
[read more]

SeriousSamClassic-VK
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic-VK is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic with Vulkan support, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports Vulkan and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the how to install section for more information.
[read more]

item.title: SeriousSamClassic [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: SeriousSamClassic [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: tx00100xt
item.itunes:summary:
SeriousSamClassic
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.3 and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.
[read more]
item.description:
SeriousSamClassic
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.3 and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SeriousSamClassic
(Shooter)
SeriousSamClassic is open source game engine version developed by Croteam for Serious Sam Classic, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.3 and SDL2.
Note that while the Serious-Engine source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Serious Sam Classic The First Encounter and Serious Sam Classic The Second Encounter the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.
[read more]

this is only side project
terimalOS

start
help
exit
shmenu

this is only side project

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: SDM NEXT GEN [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: SDM NEXT GEN [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
SDM NEXT GEN
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Sdm Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module is designed to streamline the device's operations, leading to smoother and faster user experience. By leveraging the power of Magisk, this module offers a convenient and effective way to enhance the capabilities of Snapdragon devices, making it a valuable tool for users seeking to maximize the potential of their devices.
Whether it's improving gaming performance, multitasking, or overall system responsiveness, this module is a versatile solution for optimizing Qualcomm Snapdragon devices.

The Sdm Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module is a revolutionary tool for gamers looking to enhance their gaming experience. This Magisk module is specifically designed to optimize the gaming performance of your device, ensuring smoother gameplay and faster load times.

With this module, you can expect improved graphics, reduced lag, and overall enhanced gaming performance. Whether you're a casual gamer or a hardcore enthusiast, the Sdm Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module is a must-have for anyone looking to take their gaming experience to the next level.

With its innovative technology and seamless integration, this module is a game-changer for mobile gamers.


In the dynamic realm of Android customization, users often seek ways to enhance their device's performance without compromising stability. The SDM Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module emerges as a powerful solution, offering advanced optimizations tailored for Snapdragon devices. This module, designed to complement the Magisk framework, takes performance tuning to the next level. Here's an exploration of its features, benefits, and frequently asked questions.

Features:
1. Smart Performance Tuning:The SDM Next Gen module intelligently optimizes the device's performance, adapting to varying workloads for a seamless experience.
2. Battery Efficiency: Experience improved battery life through targeted optimizations, ensuring a balance between performance and energy consumption.
3. GPU Boost: Unlock the full potential of your device's GPU for enhanced graphics performance, ideal for gaming and graphics-intensive applications.
4. Memory Management: Efficient memory utilization ensures smoother multitasking and overall system responsiveness.
5. Advanced Kernel Tweaks: Tailored kernel tweaks contribute to a more refined and stable performance without compromising the device's integrity.

Benefits:
1. Smoother User Experience: Enjoy a faster and more responsive user interface, thanks to optimized performance across various usage scenarios.
2. Extended Battery Life: The module's intelligent optimizations contribute to a more efficient use of resources, translating to longer battery endurance.
3. Gaming Performance: Gamers will appreciate the GPU boost, elevating the gaming experience with improved graphics rendering and smoother gameplay.
4. Stability and Reliability: SDM Next Gen Optimization is crafted with stability in mind, ensuring that optimizations enhance rather than disrupt the device's functionality.

FAQ:
Q1: Is this module compatible with all Snapdragon devices?
A: The module is designed for Snapdragon-powered devices, but compatibility may vary. It's recommended to check the developer's documentation for a list of supported devices.

Q2: Can I uninstall the module if I encounter issues?
A: Yes, the module can be easily uninstalled through the Magisk Manager app. Ensure to follow proper uninstallation procedures to avoid any potential issues.

Q3: Will this module void my warranty?
A: Generally, using Magisk modules does not void warranties. However, it's advisable to check your device's warranty terms and conditions for clarity.

Q4: How often should I update the module?
A: Check for updates periodically on the official repository. It's recommended to read release notes and follow any specific update instructions provided by the developer.

Unlock the full potential of your Snapdragon device with the SDM Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module – a performance-enhancing powerhouse for the Android enthusiast. Install, optimize, and elevate your mobile experience!
[read more]

Whether it's improving gaming performance, multitasking, or overall system responsiveness, this module is a versatile solution for optimizing Qualcomm Snapdragon devices.

With its innovative technology and seamless integration, this module is a game-changer for mobile gamers.

A: Check for updates periodically on the official repository. It's recommended to read release notes and follow any specific update instructions provided by the developer.

Unlock the full potential of your Snapdragon device with the SDM Next Gen Optimization Magisk Module – a performance-enhancing powerhouse for the Android enthusiast. Install, optimize, and elevate your mobile experience!

item.title: Perplexity AI App [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Perplexity AI App [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: inulute
item.itunes:summary:
Perplexity AI App
(Internet Apps)
The Perplexity AI Desktop App is an unofficial application developed by inulute that brings the power of AI language processing to your desktop, powered by Electron. This application is designed to enhance your experience with Perplexity AI

[read more]
item.description:

(Internet Apps)
The Perplexity AI Desktop App is an unofficial application developed by inulute that brings the power of AI language processing to your desktop, powered by Electron. This application is designed to enhance your experience with Perplexity AI

(Internet Apps)
The Perplexity AI Desktop App is an unofficial application developed by inulute that brings the power of AI language processing to your desktop, powered by Electron. This application is designed to enhance your experience with Perplexity AI

[read more]

item.title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: PixelProps Beta [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: t3sl4
item.itunes:summary:
PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
item.description:

One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]

PixelProps Beta
(Utilities)
Welcome to the official PixelProps Pling page! This is where you can download the latest Pixel Beta props. These props are designed with a focus on functionality and compatibility.
One of the key features of our Pixel Beta props is their ability to pass both Basic and Device Integrity checks within PlayIntegrity. This ensures that they integrate well with your device and applications.

As the sole developer behind PixelProps, I am committed to maintaining and updating the Pixel Beta props. Your feedback and experience are important to me, and they help in making PixelProps better.

Thank you for choosing PixelProps. Enjoy exploring our Pling page and feel free to reach out if you have any questions or feedback. I’m here to help!
[read more]
